query: SELECT id, guestName, guestEmail, hostListingId, requestedDate, mealType, numberOfGuests, paymentStatus, createdAt FROM bookings WHERE guestName LIKE '%Ethan Xu%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user JF4SDJ8UQnAgkD3.root --database mkW6ExSEHJcqGWsa6M4fqn --execute SELECT id, guestName, guestEmail, hostListingId, requestedDate, mealType, numberOfGuests, paymentStatus, createdAt FROM bookings WHERE guestName LIKE '%Ethan Xu%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10
